source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The diagram shows the plan of a room. Adjoining walls are perpendicular to each other and the lengths of some of the walls are shown. What is the length of the perimeter of the room? <image1>

answer_text is a symbolic expression '$6a+8b$', consistent with combining multiple labeled segment lengths
multiple-choice format with algebraic perimeter options suggests a composed result rather than a single-step readout
verifiability: choices are provided and answer_text matches one explicit option ('$6a+8b$')
target answer is a closed-form symbolic expression, which is straightforward to compare exactly
